## Runtime.RuntimeContext.getRuntimeTask() method

Gets a runtime task by its composite ID (with caching). Implements ITaskContext interface.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRuntimeTask(id: TaskId): Result<RuntimeTask>;
```
